content: This document implements strict enforcement of creative phase requirements for Level 3-4 tasks, ensuring all design decisions are properly documented and verified before implementation can proceed.
Implementation is blocked and cannot proceed until all required creative phases are completed.
At the entry gate of the creative phase, task complexity must be confirmed as Level 3-4, design decisions identified, requirements documented, and participants notified.
During the process gate of the creative phase, all options must be considered, their pros/cons documented, technical constraints identified, and implementation impacts assessed.
At the exit gate of the creative phase, all decisions and their rationale must be documented, an implementation plan must be outlined, and verification against requirements must be performed.
Creative phases MUST be completed before implementation.
Use markers like '🎨🎨🎨 ENTERING CREATIVE PHASE' and '🎨🎨🎨 EXITING CREATIVE PHASE' to clearly indicate creative phase boundaries.
Note that 'creative-phase-enforcement.md' is the active document, related to 'creative-phase-architecture.md' and 'task-tracking-intermediate.md'.
